shorts.title: PHOTOS: Firefighters battle Dunmore fire
shorts.description: DUNMORE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Firefighters were on scene Monday night as they battled a fire in Dunmore. Lackawanna County Officials confirmed with 28/22 News crews were called to the 1300 block of Jefferson Avenue in Dunmore at about 9:30 p.m. Monday evening for a reported residential structure fire. Images shared with 28/22 News show [...]
shorts.content: DUNMORE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Firefighters were on scene Monday night as they battled a fire in Dunmore. Lackawanna County Officials confirmed with 28/22 News crews were called to the 1300 block of Jefferson Avenue in Dunmore at about 9:30 p.m. Monday evening for a reported residential structure fire. shorts.title: Residents call data center pamphlet 'propaganda'
shorts.description: ARCHBALD, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Data center meetings have become an almost weekly occurrence in NEPA, especially in Lackawanna County, but on Monday, people in one community there stood up in an act of defiance against a data center developer. shorts.title: Holocaust Remembrance Day brings reflection to community
shorts.title_distilled: Holocaust Remembrance Day brings reflection to community.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A powerful moment of reflection brought people together in Lackawanna County: Members of the Jewish community gathered to remember the past and look ahead. Candles flickered as several dozen people came together in Scranton for Holocaust Remembrance Day. The event focuses on honoring loved ones, sharing stories, and reflecting on [...]
